tokens.name: Gilt-Leaf Alchemist
tokens.oracle_text:
Deathtouch
{T}: Conjure a card named Forest onto the battlefield. Activate only if two or more Elf cards are in your graveyard.

tokens.name: Goro-Goro, Disciple of Ryusei
tokens.oracle_text:
{R}: Creatures you control gain haste until end of turn.
{3}{R}{R}: Create a 5/5 red Dragon Spirit creature token with flying. Activate only if you control an attacking modified creature. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

tokens.name: Kari Zev, Crew of Two
tokens.oracle_text:
Menace, Haste
Whenever Kari Zev attacks while you don't control a legendary Monkey, conjure a card named Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer onto the battlefield tapped and attacking. At the beginning of the next end step, if that card is on the battlefield, return it to its owner's hand.

tokens.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
tokens.name: Lotho, Corrupt Shirriff
tokens.oracle_text: Whenever a player casts their second spell each turn, you lose 1 life and create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
tokens.flavor_text:
"Whatever is wrong in the Shire, Lotho will be at the bottom of it: you can be sure of that."
—Pippin

tokens.set_name: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
tokens.name: Minsc & Boo, Timeless Heroes
tokens.oracle_text:
When Minsc & Boo enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, you may create Boo, a legendary 1/1 red Hamster creature token with trample and haste.
+1: Put three +1/+1 counters on up to one target creature with trample or haste.
−2: Sacrifice a creature. When you do, Minsc & Boo deals X damage to any target, where X is that creature's power. If the sacrificed creature was a Hamster, draw X cards.
Minsc & Boo, Timeless Heroes can be your commander.

tokens.name: Preponderant Pearl
tokens.oracle_text:
When this artifact enters, conjure a card named Ponder into your hand.
Whenever one or more Merfolk you control deal combat damage to a player, sacrifice this artifact. If you do, conjure a card named Flooded Strand into your hand.

tokens.name: Quicksilver Lapidary
tokens.oracle_text: When Quicksilver Lapidary enters, conjure a card named Mox Opal into your hand.

tokens.name: Swan Song
tokens.oracle_text: Counter target enchantment, instant, or sorcery spell. Its controller creates a 2/2 blue Bird creature token with flying.
tokens.flavor_text: Don't be sad the song has ended. Be happy you heard its final notes.

tokens.name: Tataru Taru
tokens.oracle_text:
When Tataru Taru enters, you draw a card and target opponent may draw a card.
Scions' Secretary — Whenever an opponent draws a card, if it isn't that player's turn, create a tapped Treasure token. This ability triggers only once each turn.

tokens.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
tokens.name: The One Ring
tokens.oracle_text:
Indestructible
When The One Ring enters, if you cast it, you gain protection from everything until your next turn.
At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 1 life for each burden counter on The One Ring.
{T}: Put a burden counter on The One Ring, then draw a card for each burden counter on The One Ring.

tokens.name: Tome of the Infinite
tokens.oracle_text: {U}, {T}: Conjure a random card from Tome of the Infinite's spellbook into your hand. It perpetually gains "You may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast this spell."

tokens.name: Tower Winder
tokens.oracle_text:
Reach, deathtouch
When this creature enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Command Tower, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle.
tokens.flavor_text: The tower guards eventually gave up, figuring it was better at the job anyway.

tokens.name: Treasure
tokens.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.

tokens.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.
